question: ABC \mathrm{ABC} ABC ত্রিভুজে cos⁡A+cos⁡C=sin⁡B \cos \mathrm{A}+\cos \mathrm{C}=\sin \mathrm{B} cosA+cosC=sinB হলে ∠A \angle A ∠A সমান-
explanation: প্রদত্ত সমস্যাটি সমাধান করতে আমরা নিস্নলিখিত ধাপগুলি অনুসরণ করব: 1. প্রদত্ত তথ্য বিশ্লেষণঃ △ABC \triangle A B C △ABC ত্রিষুজে cos⁡A+cos⁡C=sin⁡B \cos A+\cos C=\sin B cosA+cosC=sinB আমাদের ∠A \angle A ∠A এর মান নির্ণয় করতে হবে। 2. ত্রিভুডের কোণের সম্পর্ক ব্যবহার: যেকোনো ত্রিভুজে কোণের সমষ্টি A+B+C=180∘ A+B+C=180^{\circ} A+B+C=180∘ সুতরাং, C=180∘−A−B C=180^{\circ}-A-B C=180∘−A−B 3. cos⁡C \cos C cosC কে cos⁡(180∘−A−B) \cos \left(180^{\circ}-A-B\right) cos(180∘−A−B) शिजেবে প্রকাশ: cos⁡(180∘−A−B)=−cos⁡(A+B) \cos \left(180^{\circ}-A-B\right)=-\cos (A+B) cos(180∘−A−B)=−cos(A+B) সুতরাং, cos⁡C=−cos⁡(A+B) \cos C=-\cos (A+B) cosC=−cos(A+B) 4. প্রদত্ত সমীকরণে মান বসানো: cos⁡A+cos⁡C=sin⁡B \cos A+\cos C=\sin B cosA+cosC=sinB cos⁡A−cos⁡(A+B)=sin⁡B \cos A-\cos (A+B)=\sin B cosA−cos(A+B)=sinB 5. cos⁡(A+B) \cos (A+B) cos(A+B) কে প্রসারণ: cos⁡(A+B)=cos⁡Acos⁡B−sin⁡Asin⁡B \cos (A+B)=\cos A \cos B-\sin A \sin B cos(A+B)=cosAcosB−sinAsinB সুতরাং, cos⁡A−(cos⁡Acos⁡B−sin⁡Asin⁡B)=sin⁡B \cos A-(\cos A \cos B-\sin A \sin B)=\sin B cosA−(cosAcosB−sinAsinB)=sinB সরলীকরণ করলে পাই: cos⁡A(1−cos⁡B)+sin⁡Asin⁡B=sin⁡B \cos A(1-\cos B)+\sin A \sin B=\sin B cosA(1−cosB)+sinAsinB=sinB 6. সমীকরণটি সমাধান: cos⁡A(1−cos⁡B)+sin⁡Asin⁡B=sin⁡B \cos A(1-\cos B)+\sin A \sin B=\sin B cosA(1−cosB)+sinAsinB=sinB cos⁡A(1−cos⁡B)=sin⁡B(1−sin⁡A) \cos A(1-\cos B)=\sin B(1-\sin A) cosA(1−cosB)=sinB(1−sinA) 7. ∠A \angle A ∠A এবং ∠B \angle B ∠B এর সম্পর্ক নির্ণয়: এই সমীকরণটি সমাধান করে আমরা পাই ∠A=90∘ \angle A=90^{\circ} ∠A=90∘

question: (a+b+c)(b+c−a)=3bc\left(a+b+c\right)\left(b+c-a\right)=3bc(a+b+c)(b+c−a)=3bc হলে, A=?A=?A=?
explanation: (a+b+c)(b+c−a)=3bc⇒{(b+c)+a}(b+c−a)=3bc⇒(b+c)2−a2=3bc⇒b2+2bc+c2−a2=3bc⇒b2+c2−a2=bc∴b2+c2−a2bc=1⇒b2+c2−a22bc=12∴cosA=12∴A=cos−112=π3=60 \begin{array}{l}(a+b+c)(b+c-a)=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow\{(b+c)+a\}(b+c-a)=3 b{c} \\ \Rightarrow(b+c)^{2}-a^{2}=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow b^{2}+2 b c+c^{2}-a^{2}=3 b c \\ \Rightarrow b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}=b c \\ \therefore \frac{b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}}{b c}=1 \\ \Rightarrow \quad \frac{b^{2}+c^{2}-a^{2}}{2 b c}=\frac{1}{2} \\ \therefore cosA =\frac{1}{2} \\ \therefore A=cos^{-1} \frac{1}{2}=\frac{\pi}{3}=60\end{array} (a+b+c)(b+c−a)=3bc⇒{(b+c)+a}(b+c−a)=3bc⇒(b+c)2−a2=3bc⇒b2+2bc+c2−a2=3bc⇒b2+c2−a2=bc∴bcb2+c2−a2=1⇒2bcb2+c2−a2=21∴cosA=21∴A=cos−121=3π=60

question: sinx sin(x+30°) + cosx sin(x+120°) এর মান কত?
explanation: sin⁡xsin⁡(x+30∘)+cos⁡xsin⁡(x+120∘)=sin⁡xsin⁡(x+30∘)+cos⁡xsin⁡(90∘+30∘+x)=sin⁡xsin⁡(x+30∘)+cos⁡xcos⁡(x+30∘)=cos⁡{(x+30∘)−x}=cos⁡30∘=32 \begin{aligned} &\sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \sin \left(x+120^{\circ}\right) \\ = & \sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \sin \left(90^{\circ}+30^{\circ}+x\right) \\ = & \sin x \sin \left(x+30^{\circ}\right)+\cos x \cos \left(x+30^{\circ}\right) \\ = & \cos \left\{\left(x+30^{\circ}\right)-x\right\} \\ = & \cos 30^{\circ}=\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\end{aligned} ====sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxsin(x+120∘)sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxsin(90∘+30∘+x)sinxsin(x+30∘)+cosxcos(x+30∘)cos{(x+30∘)−x}cos30∘=23

question: tan⁡θ=yx\tanθ=\frac{y}{x}tanθ=xy হলে, xcos⁡2θ+ysin⁡2θx\cos2θ+y\sin2θxcos2θ+ysin2θ এর মান-
explanation: xcos⁡2θ+ysin⁡2θ=x⋅1−tan⁡2θ1+tan⁡2θ+y⋅2tan⁡θ1+tan⁡2θ=x⋅1−y2x21+y2x2+y⋅2yx1+y2x2 \begin{aligned} & x \cos 2 \theta+y \sin 2 \theta \\ = & x \cdot \frac{1-\tan ^{2} \theta}{1+\tan ^{2} \theta}+y \cdot \frac{2\tan \theta}{1+\tan ^{2} \theta} \\ = & x \cdot \frac{1-\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}{1+\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}+y \cdot \frac{2 \frac{y}{x}}{1+\frac{y^{2}}{x^{2}}}\end{aligned} ==xcos2θ+ysin2θx⋅1+tan2θ1−tan2θ+y⋅1+tan2θ2tanθx⋅1+x2y21−x2y2+y⋅1+x2y22xy =x⋅(x2−y2x2×x2x2+y2)+y(2yx×x2x2+y2) =x \cdot\left(\frac{x^{2}-y^{2}}{x^{2}} \times \frac{x^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}\right)+y\left(\frac{2 y}{x} \times \frac{x^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}\right) =x⋅(x2x2−y2×x2+y2x2)+y(x2y×x2+y2x2) =x⋅x2−y2x2+y2+y⋅2xyx2+y2 =x \cdot \frac{x^{2}-y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}+y \cdot \frac{2 x y}{x^{2}+y^{2}} =x⋅x2+y2x2−y2+y⋅x2+y22xy =x3−xy2x2+y2+2xy2x2+yz =\frac{x^{3}-x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}}+\frac{2 x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y z} =x2+y2x3−xy2+x2+yz2xy2 =x3−xy2+2xy2x2+y2=x3+xy2x2+y2=x(x2+y2)x2+y2=x \begin{aligned}=\frac{x^{3}-x y^{2}+2 x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}} & =\frac{x^{3}+x y^{2}}{x^{2}+y^{2}} =\frac{x\left(x^{2}+y^{2}\right)}{x^{2}+y^{2}}=x\end{aligned} =x2+y2x3−xy2+2xy2=x2+y2x3+xy2=x2+y2x(x2+y2)=x

explanation: sin⁡A=12,cos⁡B=12∴A=30∘∴B=45∘ \begin{array}{ll} \sin A=\frac{1}{2}, & \cos B=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \\ \therefore A=30^{\circ} & \therefore B=45^{\circ} \end{array} sinA=21,∴A=30∘cosB=21∴B=45∘ cos⁡(A+B)=cos⁡A⋅cos⁡B−sin⁡A⋅sin⁡B=cos⁡30∘⋅cos⁡45∘−sin⁡30∘⋅sin⁡45∘=32⋅12−12⋅12=3−122 \begin{aligned} \cos (A+B) & =\cos A \cdot \cos B-\sin A \cdot \sin B \\ & =\cos 30^{\circ} \cdot \cos 45^{\circ}-\sin 30^{\circ} \cdot \sin 45^{\circ} \\ & =\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}-\frac{1}{2} \cdot \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \\ & =\frac{\sqrt{3}-1}{2 \sqrt{2}} \end{aligned} cos(A+B)=cosA⋅cosB−sinA⋅sinB=cos30∘⋅cos45∘−sin30∘⋅sin45∘=23⋅21−21⋅21=223−1
